scripts.postinstall: npm run build -w @identity-kit/shared && npm run build -w @identity-kit/brand-assets && npm run build -w @identity-kit/pdf-chrome
scripts.dev:api:built: npm run build -w @identity-kit/shared && npm run build -w @identity-kit/generation && npm run build -w @identity-kit/api && npm run start --workspace=@identity-kit/api
scripts.dev:all:fast: npm run dev:web & npm run dev:api
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:clean && (npm run dev:web & npm run dev:api)
scripts.build: npm run build -w @identity-kit/shared && npm run build -w @identity-kit/brand-assets && npm run build -w @identity-kit/pdf-chrome && npm run build -w @identity-kit/generation && npm run build -w web && npm run build -w @identity-kit/api
